previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out momentarily near the 500m locking wheels with Bail Denied.
Held up for clear running at a vital stage in the straight.
Restrained at the start to a rearward trailing position.
Hung in a contacted marker pegs around the 1000m.
Broke gait on the turn into the back straight in the first lap of the event.
Hung in and contacted a marker peg on the final corner.
